title: Pakistan: 4 troops, 6 terrorists killed in 90-minute gun battle at Karachi rangers HQ
summary_full: Pakistani security forces thwarted a major militant assault on a Sindh Rangers compound in Karachi, killing six terrorists and apprehending one. The coordinated attack, claimed by Jamaat-ul-Ahrar, resulted in the tragic loss of four Rangers personnel. This incident marks the first significant terrorist strike in the city since October 2024, highlighting ongoing security challenges.
